STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.descript: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Whenever an enemy dies, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.flavor: Luxury Cruise across the Higan Shores!
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-THE_TITANIC.title: The Titanic
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-COMMERCIAL_TITANIC.d: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and gain {Value1} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold]. Whenever an enemy dies, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], then gain {Gold} gold if it was not a minion.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_EYES.descr: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your second turn, lose [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_EYES.title: Shinigami Eyes
